title: ICC Rankings
description: Full-stack ICC cricket points tracker covering 1973–2025, with an AI chatbot that answers natural language questions over live tournament data.
long_description: ICC Rankings tracks cumulative team points across every ICC format — Men's and Women's World Cups, T20s, Test Championship, and age-group events from 1973 to 2025. A Rust/Axum API serves the historical data; a Next.js frontend renders rankings, team breakdowns, and event pages. The centrepiece is Twelfth Man, an AI chatbot built on LangGraph and Claude that routes natural language queries through a multi-node agent: classifying intent, running read-only SQL, executing sandboxed Pandas analytics, and formatting the response with optional inline charts.
highlights: 6-node LangGraph agent: Router classifies intent and branches to SQL Agent, Analytics, Greeting, or Off-topic nodes before Formatter
Rust/Axum API auto-seeds 52 years of ICC tournament data (1973–2025) across 5 formats on first boot
Read-only PostgreSQL guardrails + sandboxed Pandas code execution keep the chatbot safe against injection and runaway queries

diagrams.title: Twelfth Man LangGraph Query Flow
diagrams.content:
graph TD
    MSG[User Message] --> ROUTER[Router\nHaiku intent classifier]
    ROUTER -->|sql_query| SQL[SQL Agent\nSonnet]
    ROUTER -->|analytics| ANA[Analytics\nSonnet + Pandas]
    ROUTER -->|greeting| GREET[Greeting]
    ROUTER -->|off_topic| OT[Off Topic]
    ROUTER -->|clarification| DONE([END])
    SQL --> FMT[Formatter\nHaiku]
    ANA --> FMT
    FMT --> RESP([Response])
    GREET --> RESP
    OT --> RESP

diagrams.title: ICC Rankings System Architecture
diagrams.content:
graph TD
    Browser[User Browser] --> Web[Next.js 14\nFrontend :5237]
    Web --> API[Rust / Axum API\n:7429]
    Web --> Bot[Twelfth Man Chatbot\nFastAPI + LangGraph :8100]
    API --> PG[(PostgreSQL\nICC historical data)]
    Bot --> PG
    Bot --> Mongo[(MongoDB\nChat history)]
    Bot --> Claude[Claude API\nHaiku + Sonnet]
    API --> Lambda[AWS Lambda\nECR container]
    Bot --> Lambda
